title: linoma alba
side_effects: Linoma alba can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions in sensitive individuals, which may manifest as skin irritation, itching, or even anaphylaxis in severe cases. Prolonged or excessive use of linoma alba may lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. In rare instances, improper use of linoma alba can cause liver or kidney damage due to its high toxicity levels. Additionally, ingesting linoma alba may disrupt hormone balances, resulting in symptoms such as irregular menstrual cycles or impotence.
